title: Drone scare near Air Force One triggers ground stop at Florida's Palm Beach Airport - Report
content:
A drone scare was reported near Air Force One.
*   The incident occurred at Florida's Palm Beach Airport.
*   It triggered a ground stop at the airport.

title: US Supreme Court set to hear Trump’s bid to end birthright citizenship
content:
The US Supreme Court is preparing to hear a significant legal challenge.
*   The case stems from former President Trump's effort to end birthright citizenship in the United States.
*   The hearing will address the constitutionality and future of automatic citizenship for individuals born on U.S. soil.

title: New images show destruction of $300 million USAF E-3 Sentry, struck by Iranian missile in Saudi's Prince Sultan Air Base
content:
New images confirm the destruction of a $300 million USAF E-3 Sentry aircraft.
*   The aircraft was struck by an Iranian missile.
*   The incident occurred at Saudi Arabia's Prince Sultan Air Base.

title: Middle East War: Ukraine's Zelenskyy accuses Russia of assisting Iran with satellite images, intel of US air base
content:
Here's a summary of the news headline in 3 bullet points:

*   Ukrainian President Zelenskyy has accused Russia of providing assistance to Iran.
*   This alleged assistance includes sharing satellite images and intelligence.
*   The intelligence shared specifically concerned a U.S. air base.

title: Florida man stopped by police after drivers report ‘missiles’ mounted on truck
content:
A Florida man was stopped by police.
*   The intervention followed reports from other drivers.
*   Drivers claimed to have seen "missiles" mounted on the man's truck.

title: Navy employee kills paramour, stores half in fridge
content:
Here's a summary of that headline in 3 bullet points:

*   A Navy employee committed murder.
*   The victim was identified as the employee's paramour.
*   The perpetrator stored half of the victim's body in a refrigerator.

title: Protest taken out against KPS Magnet scheme in Kodagu
content:
Here's a 3-bullet point summary:

*   A protest has been staged in Kodagu.
*   The demonstration is specifically against the 'KPS Magnet scheme'.
*   This action signifies public opposition to the scheme in the region.
